name: potassium
description: Native OpenClaw tools and skills for Infomaniak kDrive, Mail, kChat, URL shortener, and discovery workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Use Infomaniak kDrive, Mail, kChat, and URL tools in OpenClaw.
interface.longDescription: Potassium adds native OpenClaw tools, skills, and a kChat channel for Infomaniak kDrive, Mail, kChat, URL shortener, and discovery workflows. Credentials stay in environment variables and mutations are blocked by default.
